We've been speaking to Iranians during one week of war. Here's what they saidOrdinary Iranians reflect on seven days of conflict and where they see their country going next. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c5y5lqygrn7o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c5y5lqygrn7o#1 Sat, 07 Mar 2026 06:00:32 GMT
Trump wants to pick Iran's new leader - will a hostile regime under fire agree? The president's vision of Iran's future could meet fierce opposition, writes chief international correspondent Lyse Doucet. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c2k8339xn9jo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c2k8339xn9jo#1 Fri, 06 Mar 2026 22:06:42 GMT
US lands huge bomber at UK air base after warning of surge in strikes on IranThe aircraft is the fastest bomber in the US Air Force and is piloted by a crew of four. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c75ekve9yq9o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c75ekve9yq9o#1 Sat, 07 Mar 2026 07:54:55 GMT
There's an inflation wave coming - what does the war mean for the UK economy?Economic consequences are an intrinsic aspect of the Iran conflict, writes BBC economics editor Faisal Islam. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd9gvv5w3v8o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd9gvv5w3v8o#1 Sat, 07 Mar 2026 04:02:08 GMT
AI-generated Iran war videos surge as creators use new tech to cash inThe US-Israel war with Iran is being monetised by online creators with AI-generated misinformation. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ckg8wvz427vo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ckg8wvz427vo#1 Sat, 07 Mar 2026 00:32:35 GMT
Soham murderer Ian Huntley taken off life support, BBC understandsThe convicted murderer has been in hospital since late February after being hit on the head in prison. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c62d410y4qko?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c62d410y4qko#2 Sat, 07 Mar 2026 01:47:31 GMT
Armed robots take to the battlefield in Ukraine warUkraine has embarked on a programme to deploy armed robots on the battlefield against Russian forces. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c62662gzlp8o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c62662gzlp8o#2 Sat, 07 Mar 2026 00:36:19 GMT
Withheld Epstein files with accusations against Trump released by justice departmentThe Department of Justice said the released files had been "incorrectly coded as duplicative" and inadvertently not published. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4g0dzg6e4mo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4g0dzg6e4mo#2 Fri, 06 Mar 2026 17:58:33 GMT
Three women interviewed on suspicion of sex trafficking in Al Fayed investigationThe women have been interviewed under suspicion of aiding and abetting rape and human trafficking, the Met Police says. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c2lrwv5p7e7o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c2lrwv5p7e7o#2 Fri, 06 Mar 2026 21:06:49 GMT
Russell takes Melbourne pole after Verstappen crashGeorge Russell takes pole position as Mercedes dominate a qualifying session for the Australian Grand Prix in which Max Verstappen crashed. https://www.bbc.com/sport/formula1/articles/c8d5l339535o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/sport/formula1/articles/c8d5l339535o#2 Sat, 07 Mar 2026 07:18:51 GMT
Deadly storms and tornadoes strike US state of MichiganA series of tornadoes tore through several cities, uprooting trees and destroying homes. https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/cx2r4wdgkzxo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/cx2r4wdgkzxo#2 Sat, 07 Mar 2026 07:08:58 GMT
